## §3 — K_CLOSURE_REPORT.md section-by-section content specifications

12 sections per Meta-Q1 LOCKED Session 1 + S-LOCK-3 ratified structure.

### §3.1 — Section 1: Executive summary + К-L14 thesis

**Target lines**: 200-300

**Content specification**:

**§1.1 К-series formal closure announcement**:
- Date: 2026-05-XX (A'.8 closure ratification commit timestamp)
- Cumulative К-Lxx series: **21 invariants final state**
- К-L14 thesis ratified canonical text (Q1 LOCKED Session 1, S-LOCK-4 evidence baseline 9 verifications)
- К-extensions designation operationalized (cascade #0 + #1 closed pre-closure; cascade #2 deferred post-closure)
- Closure event boundary specification (Commit 1 push to origin/main = closure timestamp)

**§1.2 К-L14 canonical text** (per Q1 LOCKED Session 1 verbatim):

> Performance derives from clean complex architecture, не traded against simplicity.
>
> **Causality claim**: Each principled architectural addition increases performance ceiling, not decreases it.
>
> **Empirical claim**: Verified through cascade closure metrics — 9 verifications across К-series + V substrate streams as of A'.8 closure (1 soft-halt annotated honestly, retroactively closed).
>
> **Falsifiability commitment**: К-extensions future evidence (V2 substrate, A'.9 analyzer, Phase B M-cycle, future К-series enhancements) continues empirical evidence gathering; К-closure report records both confirming and disconfirming evidence accumulated to date.
>
> **Default-inclusion bias**: Architectural items default-include unless specific architectural reason против; tactical heuristics («overengineered», «YAGNI», «premature optimization») are category error в research framework context — see Lesson #20.
>
> **Burden of proof**: On exclusion of architectural items, не inclusion. К-L14 is meta-invariant guiding K-Lxx series evolution + project-wide architectural decisions.

**§1.3 Closure achievements summary**:
- 20 К-L invariants finalized (К-L1..L19 + К-L6 SUPERSEDED + К-L3.1/L7.1/L15.1 subs)
- К-L20 reserved post-Mod API lock

- METHODOLOGY v1.10 (Lessons promotion batch: 12 FORMALIZE + 9 DEFER + 1 SUNSET)
- К-extensions designation operational (3 cascades identified — #0+#1 closed, #2 deferred)
- A'.7.x + A'.7.5 retroactively serve as К-extensions cascades pre-closure (architectural nature ratifies framing)

**§1.4 Forward narrative pointer**:
- A'.8 closes К-series formally
- Forward sequencing: К-extensions #2 (Godot) post-closure → V2 amendment → V2 → A'.9 → Mod API lock → Phase B

### §5.2 — Per-commit verification gate

Each commit MUST pass per METHODOLOGY v1.9 §12.7:

1. `dotnet build -c Release DualFrontier.sln` → 0 warnings, 0 errors
2. `cmake --build native/DualFrontier.Core.Native --config Release` → clean
3. `df_native_selftest.exe` → ALL PASSED (baseline preserved — currently 97 scenarios)
4. `dotnet test tests/DualFrontier.Core.Tests/ -c Release` → 81 + 4 PASS
5. `dotnet test tests/DualFrontier.Core.Interop.Tests/ -c Release` → 202 PASS
6. `dotnet test tests/DualFrontier.Application.Tests/ -c Release` → 45 PASS
7. `dotnet test tests/DualFrontier.Modding.Tests/ -c Release` → 395 + 4 PASS (MANDATORY per v1.9 §12.7 step (c))
8. **Total 731 baseline preserved**
9. sync_register.ps1 --validate exit 0 (at Commit 5)

**Commit 1 specific verification**: brief sections completeness check — all 12 sections present per §3 specs; all К-L invariants enumerated; 9-verification baseline complete; no missing cross-references к external authoritative documents (KERNEL_ARCHITECTURE.md v2.5, METHODOLOGY.md v1.10 — these may not exist yet pending Commits 2-3, so K_CLOSURE_REPORT.md cross-references к forthcoming sections OK pre-Commit 2-3).

**Commit 1 alternative**: K_CLOSURE_REPORT.md authored с **forward references** к Commits 2-3 amended documents. References resolve correctly post-Commit 2-3 land. This pattern works because K_CLOSURE_REPORT.md content is **canonical authority** for К-L LOCKED state — KERNEL_ARCHITECTURE.md v2.5 amendments reflect this state.

### §5.3 — Atomic discipline halt conditions

- **SC-Commit1-A**: Section content specifications surface discrepancy mid-authoring → halt + cross-reference к §3 specs + amend OR escalate
- **SC-Commit1-B**: К-L14 canonical text disputed by Crystalka during authoring → halt + Q1 ratification confirmation
- **SC-Commit1-C**: 9-verification baseline accuracy disputed → halt + verify per-cascade closure reports
- **SC-Commit2-A**: KERNEL_ARCHITECTURE.md structural conflict (К-L row update breaks formatting) → halt + diagnose
- **SC-Commit3-A**: METHODOLOGY.md Lesson promotion text disputed → halt + Q4 confirmation
- **SC-Commit5-A**: sync_register.ps1 --validate fails → halt + diagnose + fix (cross-reference integrity, schema, missing terminal-state references)

### §5.4 — Commit message convention

Per A'.7.x precedent:

- `feat(architecture): A'.8 Commit 1 — K_CLOSURE_REPORT.md authoring (LOAD-BEARING Tier 1 AUTHORED per Q-N-8-4)` для Commit 1
- `feat(architecture): A'.8 Commit 2 — KERNEL_ARCHITECTURE.md v2.4 → v2.5 (8 К-L LOCK batch)` для Commit 2
- `feat(methodology): A'.8 Commit 3 — METHODOLOGY.md v1.9 → v1.10 (12 FORMALIZE + 9 DEFER batch)` для Commit 3
- `governance: A'.8 Commit 4 — PHASE_A_PRIME_SEQUENCING + MIGRATION_PROGRESS chronicle` для Commit 4
- `governance: A'.8 Commit 5 — REGISTER cascade + EVT-2026-05-XX-A_PRIME_8_K_CLOSURE-RATIFICATION (register_version 2.2 → 2.3)` для Commit 5
- `governance: A'.8 Commit 6 — K_CLOSURE_AUTHORING_BRIEF EXECUTED + closure section` для Commit 6

## §6 — Halt conditions (comprehensive)

### §6.1 — Hard gates (STOP-eligible)

- **HG-1**: Working tree dirty at brief execution start (pre-flight)
- **HG-2**: Baseline 731 tests failing on main fe5a871 (any regression от А'.7.5 closure baseline)
- **HG-3**: Required tooling absent (CMake, dotnet, sync_register.ps1)
- **HG-4**: A'.7.x/A'.7.5 closure reports OR briefs not accessible (Phase 0 reads cannot proceed)
- **HG-5**: Workspace permissions OR filesystem write failures

### §6.2 — Soft halt conditions

- **SC-PHASE0-A**: Phase 0 reads surface discrepancy between brief assumption and actual document state → record divergence + proceed OR halt OR escalate (per A'.7.x §16.2 deviation precedent)
- **SC-COMMIT1-D**: K_CLOSURE_REPORT.md word count vastly exceeds 5000-7000 estimate → continue (size scales с content depth, not artificial cap) OR escalate if structurally indicating scope creep
- **SC-COMMIT2-D**: 8 К-L LOCK transitions disputed (К-L candidate text refinement needed) → halt + Q-N Session 2 deliberation extension (return-allowed-if-prior-Q-changes precedent)
- **SC-COMMIT3-D**: Lesson formalization batch composition disputed (additional promotions OR deferrals beyond S-LOCK-5) → halt + Q-N revisit
- **SC-COMMIT5-D**: REGISTER cascade reveals missing entries OR conflicting state → halt + diagnose + amend

### §6.3 — Architectural escalation conditions

Per Lesson #20 (tactical heuristics vs architectural concerns):

- **SC-ARCH-1**: Mid-execution «K_CLOSURE_REPORT too long» tactical concern surfaces — halt + remind Crystalka of К-L14 default-inclusion bias + Q11 LOCKED 5000-7000 estimate
- **SC-ARCH-2**: Mid-execution К-L invariant text refinement opportunity surfaces (e.g., better K-L14 phrasing discovered) → halt + Q1 revisit OR record candidate for future К-extensions cascade
- **SC-ARCH-3**: Mid-execution new К-L candidate surfaces (e.g., K_CLOSURE_REPORT writing surfaces missed invariant) → record в deliberation log + halt-before-damage + Q2 revisit considered

### §6.4 — К-L14 evidence integrity conditions

- **SC-K_L14-1**: А'.8 closure cascade itself accumulates hard-halt during execution → record К-L14 falsification candidate (criterion 2)
- **SC-K_L14-2**: A'.8 closure cascade breaks baseline tests → record К-L14 falsification candidate (criterion 4 atomic discipline)

All falsification candidates: record honestly в K_L14_EVIDENCE_DASHBOARD.md OR К-closure report verification annotation.
